BenchmarkConfig.description:
Which task classes × agents × how many tasks.

Two user-facing axes:

* ``task_classes`` — high-level work shapes (``puzzles``,
  ``refactors``, ``real-prs``). Each maps to one task-adapter inside
  :data:`hybrid_coding_eval.core.experiment.CATEGORY_SOURCES`.
* ``agents`` — which coding agents to sweep (``aider``, ``opencode``,
  ``mini-swe-agent``, ``cline``). Each resolves to one runner module
  under ``src/hybrid_coding_eval/agents/``.

task_classes.description: Which task classes to sweep. v1.4 taxonomy: ``puzzles`` (Exercism Python), ``refactors`` (real-dev D-tasks), ``real-prs`` (SWE-bench Verified).
task_classes.title: Task Classes

agents.description: Which coding agents to sweep. Defaults to the three agent-loop routes used across the v1.4 canonical sweeps.
agents.title: Agents

tasks_per_class.description: Cap N per task class, e.g. ``{'puzzles': 3, 'refactors': 3, 'real-prs': 3}``.
tasks_per_class.title: Tasks Per Class

task_ids.description: Optional explicit task-ID whitelist. When set, only tasks whose ``id`` field matches one of these strings are included in the plan — ``task_classes`` + ``tasks_per_class`` still apply for which sources to load FROM, but the final selection is filtered to this list.
task_ids.title: Task Ids

BenchmarkConfig.title: BenchmarkConfig

ModelsConfig.description: Which models make up cloud / local / judge / router-classifier slots.

cloud.description: Cloud model id (e.g. 'gpt-5.5'). Forwarded to the router as CLOUD_MODEL.
cloud.title: Cloud

local.description: Local model id as Ollama tag (e.g. 'gemma4:31b'). Forwarded to the router as LOCAL_MODEL.
local.title: Local

router_classifier.description: Small local model used by the llm-classifier + cascade router strategies.
router_classifier.title: Router Classifier

ModelsConfig.title: ModelsConfig

PricingConfig.description: Official API per-M-token scenarios for the report.

scenarios.description: Named pricing scenarios to re-price the dataset under.
scenarios.title: Scenarios

primary.description: Scenario used for headline numbers in decision matrices.
primary.title: Primary

PricingConfig.title: PricingConfig

strategy.description: Routing strategy the proxy uses for each agent call.
strategy.title: Strategy

banner.description: Prefix a one-line ``[router] …`` note on the first delta.
banner.title: Banner

heuristic_threshold.description: Override the heuristic cutoff in router/strategies.mjs.
heuristic_threshold.title: Heuristic Threshold

prompt_cache.description: Turn on OpenAI prompt caching on static system prefixes.
prompt_cache.title: Prompt Cache

swebench_image.description: Docker image tag for the functional sandbox.
swebench_image.title: Swebench Image

description:
Top-level benchmark-run configuration.

Two required fields (``variant_tag`` and ``out_dir``) + one required
``models`` block. Everything else has MVP-matching defaults so a
minimal YAML is:

    variant_tag: my-variant
    out_dir: results/runs/XX-my-variant
    models:
      cloud: gpt-5.5
      local: devstral:24b

variant_tag.description: Stable identifier written into every ResultRow.variant. Used by analysis to group rows by sweep.
variant_tag.title: Variant Tag

out_dir.description: Where to write raw.jsonl / outputs/ / run-notes.md.
out_dir.title: Out Dir

resume.description: Skip (task_id, route) pairs already in raw.jsonl.
resume.title: Resume

git_sha_pin.description: If set, assert current git HEAD matches this SHA before running — guards against accidental replays of a dataset from a dirty working tree.
git_sha_pin.title: Git Sha Pin

title: BenchConfig
